creator: matthias@petermann-it.de
text:
Created attachment 153337
tryton24-updates.txt

Tryton 2.4 is no longer supported by the upstream project. Users are encouraged to upgrade to a newer version as soon as possible. To support this purpose, the attached patch files do:

* update all Tryton 2.4 ports to their ultimate versions (security fixes)
* add DEPRECATED / EXPIRATION_DATE to all Tryton 2.4 ports (warn new users)

There are two shar archives included in this PR, must be applied in this order:

1) tryton24-updates.txt (version updates)
2) tryton24-deprecate.txt (deprecation)

The shar archives contain single patch files for each port.
